typography.instructions: Use 'Exo 2' for all headings to give a sci-fi/tech RPG feel. Use 'Rubik' for body text for readability and a friendly, modern touch. Ensure fonts support Cyrillic characters for Ukrainian localization.

usage.health_bar: Use 'red' for health or danger zones.
usage.mana_bar: Use 'primary.gradient' for mana or main action buttons.
usage.success: Use 'secondary.main' for completed quests and success states.

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#6C63FF] to-[#4834DF] text-white font-bold py-3 px-6 rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(108,99,255,0.5)] transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-1 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#6C63FF] text-[#6C63FF] font-bold py-2 px-6 rounded-lg hover:bg-[#6C63FF] hover:text-white transition-all duration-300
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 py-2 px-4 rounded-lg transition-colors

cards.quest: bg-[#151621]/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-[#6C63FF]/50 transition-colors duration-300 relative overflow-hidden group
cards.stat: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#1A1B26] to-[#151621] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-xl

inputs.default: bg-[#0B0C15] border border-white/10 text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#6C63FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#6C63FF] transition-all placeholder-gray-600

motion.instructions: Use Framer Motion for all entrance animations. Apply 'staggerContainer' to lists (quests, inventory). Use 'scaleIn' for modals and achievement popups.

avatars.description: Bald man with glasses, character style

skills.description: Abstract circular halo, good for magic/intellect

backgrounds.description: Dark geometric cubes, subtle gaming background
Abstract time/clock concept, good for productivity

instructions_to_main_agent.general: You are building a Gamified Task Manager. The UI must feel like a modern RPG HUD but remain functional as a dashboard. Do not use standard 'Bootstrap' layouts. Use the 'Bento' grid system.
instructions_to_main_agent.theme_implementation: Implement a 'theme-toggle' that switches between the Dark (Gaming/Night Mode) and Light (Productivity/Day Mode) palettes defined above. Default to Dark Mode.
instructions_to_main_agent.localization: All text MUST be in Ukrainian. Ensure the 'Exo 2' and 'Rubik' fonts are loaded with Cyrillic subsets.
instructions_to_main_agent.gamification_ui: Every task completion must feel rewarding. Use the 'gold_gradient' for XP gains. When a user levels up, use a full-screen overlay with 'glassmorphism.heavy'.
instructions_to_main_agent.components: Use Shadcn/UI components as a base but override their styles with the 'components' rules defined here. Specifically, remove default white backgrounds from cards and use the glassmorphism styles.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, quest cards) for testing.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
